_comment: Curated embed seed for the Explore feed (Observe stage). Each entry becomes one full-width 'embed' card rendered as a lazy iframe. Sourced from open archives (Internet Archive / Musopen, public-domain or freely-streamable) and local Keystone games. Every card carries [why, source] per the Σ₀ Verify rule. To add/replace content, edit this file — no code change. Per-card key = 'source:embed:<slug>' so each panel earns or loses its slot independently (engagement or discarded). Verified live 2026-06-27.

embeds.title: T-Rex Runner
embeds.lore: A dinosaur outruns the void of a dead connection. The original offline myth — born the moment the network dies.
embeds.why: The Chrome offline classic, served locally — no network required

embeds.title: Prince of Persia (1990)
embeds.lore: Jordan Mechner rotoscoped his brother's run frame-by-frame into a desert palace. You have sixty minutes to cross it and reach her.
embeds.why: Emulated in-browser by the Internet Archive's MS-DOS library

embeds.title: The Oregon Trail (1990)
embeds.lore: Ford the river or caulk the wagon. A whole generation learned mortality to a green CRT glow — 'you have died of dysentery.'
embeds.why: Emulated in-browser by the Internet Archive's MS-DOS library

embeds.title: Frank Sinatra — Radio Years (1943–1964)
embeds.lore: 218 radio broadcasts of The Voice, transmitted across two decades and now in the public domain. Put it on; let the room change.

embeds.title: Mozart — Symphony No. 40 in G minor, K.550
embeds.lore: The G-minor symphony — restless, modern before its time. Musopen recorded it copyright-free so it could play anywhere, forever.
